title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入斯洛伐克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入斯洛伐克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Slovakia (ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS) requirements for EU CE framework compliance (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU, and Battery Regulation 2023/1542), transport, safety, grid interconnection, and destination-country due-diligence expectations. Slovakia is a landlocked EU member state; principal import gateways are the port of Hamburg (Germany) or Koper (Slovenia) with overland transit to Slovakia.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与斯洛伐克（ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS）基于欧盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及欧盟电池法规2023/1542）、运输、安全、并网和尽责管理要求的差距对照。斯洛伐克为欧盟成员国内陆国，主要入境口岸为德国汉堡港或斯洛文尼亚科佩尔港，再通过公路或铁路运至斯洛伐克。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與斯洛伐克（ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS）基於歐盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及歐盟電池法規2023/1542）、運輸、安全、併網和盡責管理要求的差距對照。斯洛伐克為歐盟成員國內陸國，主要入境口岸為德國漢堡港或斯洛維尼亞科佩爾港，再通過公路或鐵路運至斯洛伐克。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Slovakia (ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS) requirements, EU CE directives, grid requirements, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、危险货物分类、海关裁定、并网审批或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行斯洛伐克（ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS）及欧盟相关法规的要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、危險貨物分類、海關裁定、併網核准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行斯洛伐克（ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS）及歐盟相關法規的要求。

answer_first.en: For Slovakia, the practical entry barriers are mainly EU CE conformity execution (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU where applicable, plus Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 lifecycle and due-diligence duties), ÚRSO/SEPS grid-interconnection documentation, and ÚNMS/market-acceptance alignment. EU membership makes this a harmonised-framework-first market, with 230/400 V 50 Hz utility conditions. Slovakia is landlocked; primary import logistics run via Hamburg or Koper ports with overland transit. Slovak-language documentation is often expected for project permits and installation approvals.
answer_first.zh: 对于斯洛伐克，主要入门门槛是执行欧盟CE合规路径（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要时RED 2014/53/EU，以及欧盟电池法规2023/1542的生命周期与尽责管理义务）、ÚRSO/SEPS并网文件要求，以及ÚNMS与市场验收衔接。该市场以欧盟协调框架为主，电网名义电压为230/400 V、50 Hz。斯洛伐克为内陆国，主要物流路线经德国汉堡港或科佩尔港再陆路转运。项目许可及安装批准通常需要提供斯洛伐克语文件。
answer_first.zht: 對於斯洛伐克，主要入門門檻是執行歐盟CE合規路徑（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要時RED 2014/53/EU，以及歐盟電池法規2023/1542之生命周期與盡責管理義務）、ÚRSO/SEPS併網文件要求，以及ÚNMS與市場驗收接軌。該市場以歐盟協調框架為主，電網名義電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz。斯洛伐克為內陸國，主要物流路線經德國漢堡港或科佩爾港再陸路轉運。項目許可及安裝批准通常需要提供斯洛伐克語文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
